title: Anti Slip Rug Underlay 60 x 150 cm, Non Slip Mat Cut to Size, Rug Carpet Gripper Liner for Laminate and Wooden Floors, Multipurpose Anti Slip Mat for Drawers, Shelves, and Carpets (White)
features: 【Strong Grip for Ultimate Safety】Countless bumps enhance friction and grip, the dual-sided design grips both the rug and the floor, preventing sliding or bunching during daily use, especially in high traffic areas in your home. Also making vacuuming easier, absolutely an effective solution to keep your rug securely in place. Whether your kids are playing or pets are running around, this anti slip rug underlay ensures everyone stays safe.

【Customizable Fit for Any Rug】10 size options to fit all your needs, available in the most popular sizes for easy installation. The anti-slip mat can be easily trimmed with scissors or custom shapes or sizes to fit irregularly shaped rugs or specific measurements, ensuring a perfect fit for your rug. Simply place the non-slip mat on a clean, dry floor, smooth out the wrinkles, then place your rug, and finally trim off any excess.

【Floor and Rug Protection】Open grid design allows floors to breathe and helps protect from damage. The mat effectively reduces friction between flooring and rug, protecting your rug and floor from damage and everyday wear. No worry about that it will leave any residue like other sticky rug grippers. Whether your home has hardwood, stone, vinyl, laminate, tile or other flooring, this non slip rug underlay can work.

【Durable and Safe】Made of premium PVC material, this anti-slip mat is built to withstand daily wear and tear. It’s resistant to aging and fading, with the latest geometric grid design that ensures its long-lasting performance. Absolutely an effective solution to keep your rug securely in place. The temporary factory scent dissipates rapidly — Unbox and air it out in a well-ventilated outdoor area to quickly dissipate any initial odor in 48 hours.

【Versatile and Multi-Purpose】Whether it's in the living room, bedroom, hallway, or bathroom, the Carpet Anti-Slip Mat can firmly secure carpets in place, preventing unexpected slips. Moreover, this rug underlay also works great for securing futons, seat cushions, or preventing mattresses from sliding on the frame. Or use it as a anti-slip underlay of shelves, drawers, or bookcases. One for all.
description: Product Description Enjoy life with peace Rug Anti Slip Slips and falls are one of the most common causes of injuries among young children and the elderly at home. Are you worried about slipping on the carpet and causing accidents? Our anti-slip rug pads offer extra protection, giving you peace of mind. Previous page Anti-wrinkle anti-slip Cutting versatile Durable and tear-resistant Next page Safe and beautiful Anti-slip The anti-slip carpet mat is perfect for high-traffic areas such as living rooms and hallways as it keeps the carpet firmly in place and prevents unexpected slipping.
